title: nicotiana tabacum var. suffruticosa
intro: Nicotiana tabacum var. suffruticosa, also known as dwarf tobacco or shrubby tobacco, is a variety of the Nicotiana tabacum plant, commonly used as a medicinal herb. This plant contains compounds with medicinal properties, including nicotine and other alkaloids, which have been traditionally used to aid in respiratory health, particularly in treating bronchitis, asthma, and coughs. The health benefits of Nicotiana tabacum var. suffruticosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, ease respiratory congestion, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used in traditional medicine to promote respiratory well-being.
